title: 将真实用户引入产品团队聚会——一个 JetBrains 研究故事 | 研究博客
author: Innokentii Burtsev
content:
In product development, assumptions about how people will use a tool don’t always align with the practical reality.

Last spring, during a gathering of our Junie team, we set out to bridge that gap by trying something new. We ran two hands-on user workshops – one online and another in our Belgrade office. For the first time ever, we brought external users directly into an internal event.

Here’s what happened, what we discovered, and why we think this approach is worth repeating – both for us and for other research and product teams.

Why we did it

At JetBrains, user research is a continuous effort. Our UX Research team, part of the larger Strategic Research and Market Intelligence team, conducts studies, surveys, and experiments for multiple products. Usually, our role is to provide synthesized insights to product teams.

This time, however, we wanted to flip the model. Instead of delivering results, we created a space where everyone on the product team – developers, designers, and managers – could experience first-hand contact with real users.

That kind of direct exposure can help foster empathy and transform abstract feedback into tangible improvements.

Overcoming the challenges

It wasn’t all smooth sailing:

  • Recruitment: We had just two weeks to recruit participants and prepare interview guides. We solved it through snowball sampling, reaching out via personal connections.
  • Rewards: Reward logistics were tricky, as some countries don’t support common gift card providers.
  • Training: Many team members had never conducted live interviews before, so we gave them a crash course on user research.

These adjustments proved that meaningful research activities can happen even under tight constraints.

The online sessions

We met with five active users via video to explore how they work with Junie, what tasks it helps them complete, and where they see room for improvement.

After the interviews, the team regrouped to share observations and brainstorm potential roadmap ideas.

In-person workshop 

Five small business owners joined us in our Belgrade office.

Each team had 1.5 hours to create a working website using our tool and then present the results.

This “build together” format exposed strengths and weaknesses in real-time, with deeper insights often hidden in surveys or retrospective interviews.

📌 Key takeaways

By embedding live user sessions into a team gathering, we:

✅ Gave non-researchers a chance to practice their interviewing and observation skills.
✅ Sparked product discussions grounded in real, shared experiences rather than reports.
✅ Strengthened the connection between roadmap decisions and user needs.

Even a short, structured user research activity during an in-person team workshop or planning session can make feedback tangible, accelerate learning, and increase empathy, proving that UX research doesn’t have to be separate from everyday product development.

The key is to keep it simple, prepare teams with just enough guidance, and focus on authentic user interaction.

💬 Want to take part in future JetBrains research?

Join our research panel to get early access to product experiments, test new features, and share your feedback directly with our teams.

aiSummary: JetBrains 研究团队通过将真实用户直接引入产品团队内部聚会，进行线上和线下用户工作坊，以增强团队对用户需求的同理心，并直接收集产品反馈。
oneSentenceSummary: JetBrains 研究团队通过将真实用户直接引入产品团队内部聚会，进行线上和线下用户工作坊，以增强团队对用户需求的同理心，并直接收集产品反馈。
summary: JetBrains 的 Junie 产品团队通过创新方法，首次将外部用户直接带入内部团队聚会。他们组织了线上视频访谈和线下面对面工作坊，让产品开发人员、设计师和经理亲身接触真实用户，观察用户如何使用产品并收集反馈。尽管面临招聘、奖励发放和团队成员培训等挑战，但通过灵活的策略（如滚雪球抽样和快速培训），团队成功举办了这些活动。线下的“共同构建”模式尤其有效，暴露出产品优点和痛点。此次实践证明，即使在时间紧张的情况下，将用户研究融入日常产品开发也能加深团队的同理心，促进基于真实经验的产品讨论，并强化路线图决策与用户需求的联系。

mainPoints.point: 将真实用户直接引入产品团队内部活动能增强团队同理心和反馈质量。
mainPoints.explanation: 通过让开发者、设计师和经理亲身与用户互动，可以使抽象的用户反馈变得具体，促进更深入的产品改进讨论。

mainPoints.point: 即使在资源有限的情况下，也能有效开展有意义的用户研究活动。
mainPoints.explanation: JetBrains 团队克服了时间紧迫、招聘和奖励物流等挑战，证明了灵活性和快速调整可以确保用户研究的顺利进行。

mainPoints.point: “共同构建”式用户工作坊能实时揭示产品优缺点，提供深层洞察。
mainPoints.explanation: 让用户在团队成员观察下实际操作产品并完成任务，能发现调查或回顾性访谈难以捕捉的细节和问题。

mainPoints.point: 用户研究不应与日常产品开发分离，短期、结构化的活动也能带来显著价值。
mainPoints.explanation: 将用户会话嵌入团队聚会或规划会议中，能够加速学习，提升产品决策与用户需求的结合度。

keyQuotes: 我们没有仅仅交付结果，而是创造了一个空间，让产品团队的每个人——开发者、设计师和经理——都能亲身接触真实用户。
这种直接接触有助于培养同理心，并将抽象反馈转化为具体的改进措施。
这些调整证明，即使在严格限制下，有意义的研究活动也能成功开展。
这种“共同构建”模式实时暴露了产品的优势和弱点，提供了调查或回顾性访谈中往往隐藏的深层洞察。
